privileged_info_summary: The task audits URL structure and hygiene for https://crawler-test.com/, a real public SEO testing website with 300+ test paths. The crawler generates real data by crawling this website (no synthetic data or local test server). Expected outputs are: (1) CSV export to /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/uri_analysis.csv with minimum 20 URLs containing crawler-test.com domain, and (2) text report to /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/url_hygiene_report.txt with minimum 400 characters. The report must analyze URLs exceeding 115 characters, uppercase characters, underscores, and provide remediation recommendations, containing at least 3 of the specified keywords (length, uppercase, underscore, character, recommend, rewrite, redirect) and at least 3 numeric counts.
